name: the-diabetes-code
description: Dr. Jason Fung's groundbreaking guide to preventing and reversing type 2 diabetes naturally — the science of hyperinsulinemia, the fructose-insulin resistance connection, why standard treatments fail, and how low-carb diets and intermittent fasting can restore metabolic health.
useCase: Understanding the root cause of type 2 diabetes, reversing insulin resistance, adopting low-carb dietary strategies, using intermittent fasting therapeutically, and preventing diabetic complications through lifestyle rather than medications.
knownRisks: Controversial thesis — many mainstream medical organizations do not endorse dietary reversal of diabetes
Intermittent fasting and low-carb diets are not suitable for everyone, especially those on insulin or certain medications
The author is a nephrologist, not an endocrinologist — some endocrinologists dispute his claims
Dietary changes should be supervised by a physician, especially for those taking diabetes medications
Type 1 diabetes is a different disease entirely and cannot be reversed through diet
